allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''./package.json''\); console.log\(''next:'', p.dependencies.next\); console.log\(''next-auth:'', p.dependencies[''next-auth'']\); console.log\(''@prisma/client:'', p.dependencies[''@prisma/client'']\); console.log\(''prisma:'', p.dependencies[''prisma'']\);")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''css path in components.json:'''', d[''''tailwind''''][''''css'''']\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''./package.json''\); const extra = Object.keys\(p.dependencies\).filter\(d => ![''next'',''react'',''react-dom'',''typescript'',''@types/node'',''@types/react'',''@types/react-dom'',''eslint'',''eslint-config-next'',''tailwindcss'',''@tailwindcss/postcss''].includes\(d\)\); console.log\(''Extra deps:'', extra.join\('', ''\)\);")
